titleStmt.title: SII 20.137: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 137. (B.K. No. 8 of 1935-36.) LAKSHMĒŚVAR, SHIRHATTI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: On a Slab built into the wall in the backyard of Taluk Office.

summary.p: This record is dated Śaka 1083, 6th year of the king Bijjala, Visha, Āśvija Pūrṇimā, Monday, lunar eclipse. These details are not regular. The tithi given corresponds to A.D. 1161, October 6, which was Friday. There was an eclipse on that day.

The inscription refers itself to the reign of Bijjala. It gives the genealogy of the Western Chālukya king Nūrmaḍi Taila (i.e., Taila III). Then follows an eulogistic account of Bijjala. It further states that while Vēsuva-nāyaka and four other karaṇas were administering Huligere-300, Dēvarrāśi-paṇḍita, the āchārya of God Rāmaidēva and a disciple of Amṛitarāśi-paṇḍita, purchased some land from Raṭṭagāvuṇḍa of Beḷuvana-grāma and granted the same for the worship of Muttinakeyya Indrēśvara. The village Beḷuvana is stated to have belonged to the temple of Rāmaiyadēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
nuṁ vimaḷōdyatkīrttilakṣmīviḷāsanappāhavamallanātana magaṁ sōmēśva rōrbbīśanātana tammaṁ ripurāyavarppanaḷanaṁThe beginning is lost.
permmāḍi bhūpāḷanātana putraṁ bhuvanaikamallajananāthēśaṁ nripāḷōttamaṁ . jagadēkamallanā nrupatiganujanene saṁ
daneydenūrmmaḍitailaṁ negarddā nanupamitaguṇa bhūvallabhaṁ cāḷukyana rēṁdra . tatkāladoḷu . śrīmatkaḷacu
riyakuḷōddāmaṁ negaḷdaṁ dharitriyoḷ jayalakṣmīdhāmaṁ pāḷitavibudhastōmaṁ bijjalanripāḷanahitakarāḷa .
śauryyāviḷa dāryyariṁtuddhataripubaḷasammardda narmmattaviṁ
tujvaḷaṁ davanivaḷayamānandadiṁ niccaluṁ biccaḷisalu vikhyātanādaṁ parabaḷaṁ bijjalakṣōṇipāḷaṁ . para
nriparaṁji tetta dhanamuṁ vanitājanamuṁ vibhūṣaṇāṁbaragajavājisaṁkuḷamumallade mikka nripāḷaraṁtirajjara paḍeditta
rājyavibhavakkanu māyvanāṁpane sphuritaparapratāpaguṇasaṁbhṛta bijjalabhūmi pāḷakaṁ . masakaṁgoṁḍōpanāvaṁ jagadoḷenitu
maṁ gūrjjarōrbbīśanaṁ tarjjisidaṁ kāḷiṁganaṁ bhaṁgisidanatibaḷōddṛptanappaṁdhranaṁ baṁdhisidaṁ pāṁḍyēśanaṁ khaṁḍisidananaṭiniṁ cōḷabhūpāḷanaṁ rūḷisidaṁ
sāmānyanē bijjalanripatiḷakaṁ śauryyakaṁṭhīravēṁdraṁ . © svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahā śabda mahārājādhirājaṁ . kāḷāṁjanapuravarādhīśvaraṁ . su
varṇnavṛṣabhadhvajaṁ ḍamarugatūryyanirgghōṣaṇaṁ kaḷacuriya kuḷakamaḷamārttaṁḍa . kadanapracaṁḍaṁ . mānakanakācaḷaṁ . subhaṭarādityaṁ . kaliga
ḷaṁkuśaṁ gajasāmantaṁ [.] śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjaraṁ pratāpalaṁkēśvaraṁ paranārī sa hōdaraṁ sanivārasiddhi giridurggamallaṁ . caladaṁkarāmaṁ vairībhakaṁṭhīravaṁ
bhuvanaikamalla nāmādipraśastisahitaṁ śrīmattribhuvanaikamalla vīrabijjaladēva vijaya rājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatā
raṁ saluttamire . Ene negaḷda bijjalōrbbīśana sabheyoḷ mukhyanene pesarvaḍeda
palavuṁ dēvakulaṁgaḷaṁ nilipaṁ tīrtthasthānadoḷu viprasaṁkuḷamaṁ pūjipaṁ divyavappa tithiyoḷ bhūsvarṇnagōdānavaṁ nalaviṁ .
māḍuva dharma tatparateyiṁda dharmmara kasapaṁ camūpatiḷakaṁ viśvaṁbharābhāgadoḷu Enisirrda kasapadaṁ
ḍēśana sabheyoḷmaṁtrimukhyanene negaḷdaṁ sajjananutanaṁmmaṇadaṇḍēśana tammananūna vēsuvadēvaṁ . kaśmīrōttamamaṇḍaḷa(pra)
prabhavanaṁdhrōttaṁsaratnā śaśi da śivāṁghripadmamadhupaṁ vāṇīkapōḷasthaḷī kaśmīrōdghavicitrapatranakhiḷō
rvvīsajjanōttaṁsaśoṇāśma vēsugadaṇṇanāthanesedaṁ viśvaṁbharābhāgadoḷu . Āda lladeyuṁ . kaḷacuriya kuḷādhipa
rājyalataikālaṁbarenisi rājādhyakṣarssale negaḷdiḻdarssajjanakulacūḍāmaṇigaḷartthiciṁtā maṇigaḷu . Ādeṁtene .
śivapadapayōjabhṛṁgaṁ gaṇacaraṇasarōjavararajassaṁjanitaṁ gaṇapadaśēkharananupamagaṇa putraṁ bhāyidē
vanesedaṁ dhareyoḷu vananidhiparītasakaḷāvani pogaḷaltaḷedanārppinoḷ dhṛtiyoḷ sajjanarakṣaṇeyoḷtānōrbbane mēleni
sirppudoṁda pepaṁ . haraṇacaraṇakamaḷabhṛṁgaṁ suruci rasaśiviśada kīrtti manumunicaritaṁ parahitaguṇayuktaṁ
cimmarasaṁ śiṣṭēṣṭanikarakalpamahījaṁ . palaruṁ guṇavantariḷātaḷadoḷtaṁnaṁna rillenuttaṁ vibudhāvaḷi baṇnise negarddiḻdaṁ .
jalanidhigāṁbhīryyananupamaṁ kommarasaṁ . Aṁtu negaḷda nālvaru karaṇaṁgaḷu verasu vēsuvadaṇḍanāyakaṁ huligere mū
nūruvaṁ duṣṭanigraha śiṣṭapratipāḷanadiṁ pāḷisuttamirddoṁdu devasaṁ dharmmakathā prasaṁgadiṁ dharmmakāryyatatpara
nāgi . Āryyarkkāḷāmukhamunivaryyarttribhuvanavinūta śaivāgamatātparyya rbhbhōgēśvaradācāryyarnne
gaḷdiṟdaramṛtarāśimunīṁdrar . Ene negaḷdā munimukhyaṁgenasu priyaśiśyanenisi purikara puradoḷ vinayada
yāguṇanidhi sajjanavinutaṁ dēvarāśi munipati negaḻdaṁ . Aṁtanisida rāmaidēvarā cāryya dēvarāśipaṇḍitaru
sakavarṣa 1083 neya śrīmadbhujabaḷacakravartti tribhuvanamallavīrabijjaladēva varṣada 6 neya viṣa saṁvatsaradā
śvaija puṇnami sōmavāra sōmagrahaṇa vyatīpātadaṁdu kāḷāmukhasamaya sikhāmaṇi Enisida muttina keyya IFrom this
ndrēśvaradēvargge rāmaidēvara Aṁgaraṁgabhōgakke saluva beḷuvana grāmada ṟaṭṭagāuṁḍaṁge dēvarāsipaṁḍita
ru Iṁdrēśvaradēvara pāyasada naivēdyakkaṁ naṁdādīvigegaṁ dravya nivēdanaṁ geyidu ṟaṭṭagāuṁḍana gauḍike valadoḷa
gaṇa keṟeya keḷage koṭṭa mattaru 15 Adakke sīme mūḍalu karuvana maṁneyana kaṭṭe teṁkalu paḍuvaṇiṁ
da baṁda haḷa paḍuvalu keṟeya Ēri baḍagalu baṁdaḷege hōda rājamārggada samīpada keṁgadde . © © © © .
yidanāru Āḷipidavaru vāraṇāsi kurukṣētradalli sāvira kapileyaṁ sāvira tapōdhanara koṁda pāpa
kke hōharu . na viṣaṁ viṣamityāhuḥ dēvasvaṁ viṣamucyatē viṣamēkākinaṁ haṁti dēvasvaṁ putrapautrikaṁ .
nāgārjjuna kavitvaṁ . maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 20.137 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
